items.title: ASELSAN General Manager Assistant Appointment
items.content:
Dr. Nurettin TÜYSÜZ has been appointed as the Financial Management General Manager Assistant of ASELSAN, effective from April 2, 2025.

According to the decision made by the Board of Directors, Dr. Nurettin TÜYSÜZ has been appointed as the Financial Management General Manager Assistant of ASELSAN, starting from April 2, 2025. The announcement informs the public about this appointment. The company expresses its respect to the public in the announcement.

items.title: General Information Form of ASELSAN
items.content:
This document is a general information form for ASELSAN Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., providing details about the company's management and key personnel.

The form lists the names, positions, professions, and recent roles of key personnel within ASELSAN. It also includes information about their responsibilities outside of ASELSAN, such as board memberships and advisory roles in other organizations. The document provides a snapshot of the company's leadership structure and the external engagements of its management team.
